rationale: Existing logsqueries.spec.js has one test ('should add invalid query and display error') that asserts the error-state container is visible, but it does NOT test any of the new QueryErrorState features: per-error-code action cards (fix-query, configure-resource, expand-range), error detail panel toggle/copy, block vs hero layout, filter error state, or no-events state. The feature introduces a brand-new component (QueryErrorState.vue) with 17+ data-test selectors and 8+ error-code scenarios — it is clearly its own area. A dedicated spec avoids polluting the general logsqueries.spec.js. The IncidentList.vue status-filter toggle (Alerts area) is noted as secondary/uncovered. No playwright.yml registration needed — Playwright config uses auto-discovery via testDir.
